Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Continued To May-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Status Report of Administration, a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition to Close The Estate Due to Lack of Assets has not been filed by the Administrator. The Court will issue an Order to Appear to James Torlakson (Adminstrator in Propria Persona) to appear on May 10, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If any of the above said three documents is not filed at least two Court days prior to that date, Mr. Torlakosn is ordered to appear.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
